title: analytics — error codes
description: Analytics-scoped error codes. Namespace: NOTIFICATIONS_ANALYTICS_* to match the notifications family convention (analytics is a fan-out module in the same shape). Every code maps to an HTTP status + retryability flag + user-facing bit + audit severity.

errors.description: analytics.capture kill switch is off. Event refused; no fan-out.
Tenant has consumed analytics_event_slot_per_month; new events refused until UTC month rollover. Not a delivery failure — the event never enters the ledger.
Tenant has consumed analytics_provider_slot; create refused. User-facing so admin can upgrade plan or delete an existing provider.
PropertyValidator refused the event — a value or property name matched a PII regex (email, phone, credit card, national ID). Event refused with no dispatch. Emits a compliance-audit warning.
Subject has no `analytics` consent. AnalyticsEvent marked suppressed_by_consent; no HTTP dispatch.
Provider returned 5xx or a network error occurred. Retried via RetryFailedAnalyticsDeliveriesJob backoff.
Provider returned 429. Delivery marked rate_limited; next_retry_at extended per Retry-After hint.
Circuit breaker open for this provider — dispatch suppressed until half-open probe recovers. Delivery marked circuit_open.
Provider returned 401/403 — credentials invalid or revoked. Delivery marked permanently_failed. Fires AnalyticsProviderCircuitBreakerOpened after 3 consecutive auth failures.
AnalyticsProviderConfig.config failed schema validation against data/providers/{provider}.provider.json.
event_name failed the pattern validator (snake_case with optional colon-scoped subresource).
Tenant lacks analytics_identity_merge entitlement (Enterprise-only). Identify() still writes the identity row but MergeAliasedEventsJob does NOT run.

Funnel/experiment report query would exclude >20% of the sample due to consent withdrawal. Refused unless caller has analytics.data-viewer.override permission. Prevents misinterpretation of partial data.
FlushBatchedProviderJob failed at the transport layer. Individual deliveries in the batch are marked failed; batch re-attempted on next flush cycle.
Custom webhook provider config points at a domain not in tenant.allowed_egress_domains. Refused with a compliance-audit alert (potential exfiltration attempt).
